title: Senior Doctor - Shroff Eye Centre - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Shroff Eye Centre - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!
